text: Which of the listed requirements regarding the storage of lifeboats and life rafts does NOT correspond to present Solas regulations?

options.text: Life rafts intended for throw-overboard launching shall be stored amidships secured to means for transfer to either side
They must be stored in a state of continuous readiness
They must not interfere with other survival craft

explanation: Life rafts intended for throw-overboard launching do not need to be stored amidships; they are typically stored near the ship's side to facilitate a quick, direct drop into the water.
